description: Generate a patient demographics report based on the current records in MedinTux and save it to /home/ga/patient_demographics_report.txt. The report must include the following summary statistics labeled exactly as shown: 'Total Patients: <number>', 'Male (H): <number>', 'Female (F): <number>', 'Average Age: <number>' (rounded to nearest integer), 'Oldest Patient: <LASTNAME Firstname> (born <YYYY-MM-DD>)', and 'Youngest Patient: <LASTNAME Firstname> (born <YYYY-MM-DD>)'. Following the statistics, list all patients found in the database. Calculate ages based on the current date.
